1.name: Everyman — grey tee + jeans
1.iconic: plain light-grey crew-neck short-sleeve T-shirt + classic blue jeans, barefoot
1.subject: a Latino man with warm brown skin (clearly brown, not pale or white), short dark straight hair
1.weather: Days 1-3 overcast, no sun, cool, not dark; warms from Day 4

1.title: I wake up here
1.arc_beat: Wake -> confusion -> explore -> first clue (the paper) -> false-hope light -> dead-end cliff -> hears something -> terror.

pieces.prompt: (scenery cold-open: stormy grey jungle island in a churning ocean; NO person; shared no-swap clip)

pieces.caption: Where... where am I?
pieces.prompt: (swap clip: the wake — overhead push-in, lying flat, gasps awake)

pieces.caption: My head... what happened to me?
pieces.prompt: (swap clip: seated, dazed, rubbing temple, looking around)

pieces.caption: Jungle. Everywhere. How far does this even go?
pieces.prompt: 1:1 cinematic. High aerial drone view looking down at a Latino man with warm brown skin (clearly brown, not pale or white), short dark straight hair, plain light-grey crew-neck short-sleeve T-shirt, classic blue jeans, barefoot, standing alone in a small clearing and tilting his head up toward the camera, face clearly visible and sharp. He is dwarfed by an immense dense tropical jungle stretching endlessly around and below him; vast green canopy, palms, ferns, no animals. Soft flat overcast daylight, no sun, cool, not dark, light mist. Epic scale, hyperrealistic, 8K.

pieces.caption: Hello?! Is anyone out here?!
pieces.prompt: (swap clip: walking toward camera through jungle, scanning, confused)

pieces.caption: What is this...? Who wrote this?
pieces.prompt: (swap clip: notices, picks up, reads the shredded paper, confused)

pieces.caption: There -- light. Maybe that's a way out.
pieces.prompt: 1:1 cinematic. A Latino man with warm brown skin (clearly brown, not pale or white), short dark straight hair, plain light-grey crew-neck short-sleeve T-shirt, classic blue jeans, barefoot, stands in dense dark tropical jungle and steps toward a bright glowing OPENING -- a gap in the thick dark foliage ahead where pale bright overcast daylight (and a hint of distant sea) shines through, much brighter than the gloomy jungle around him. He is turned three-quarter toward the opening, face clearly visible and lit by the bright light, eyes widening with dawning hope. Strong contrast between dark green jungle and the glowing gap, no sun, no golden light, cool tones, soft mist, no animals. Shallow depth of field keeping his face sharp, hyperrealistic, 8K.

pieces.caption: No. No, no... it's just ocean. There's nothing.
pieces.prompt: 1:1 cinematic. A Latino man with warm brown skin (clearly brown, not pale or white), short dark straight hair, plain light-grey crew-neck short-sleeve T-shirt, classic blue jeans, barefoot, stands at the edge of a high rocky cliff with a confused, shocked look, face visible. Far below and around him the vast grey storm-churned sea crashes on the rocks -- a dizzying drop, big waves, white foam; dense tropical jungle behind him. Soft flat overcast daylight, no sun, cool, not dark, wind in his clothes. Strong sense of height and exposure, hyperrealistic, 8K.

pieces.caption: HELP! Somebody-- ...wait. What was that?
pieces.prompt: (swap clip: side-on, yells at sea, turns around, stares into the jungle)

pieces.caption: ...what the hell was that?!
pieces.prompt: 1:1 cinematic. Medium close-up of a Latino man with warm brown skin (clearly brown, not pale or white), short dark straight hair, plain light-grey crew-neck short-sleeve T-shirt, at a cliff edge with dark tropical jungle behind him. He has just turned to look back and his face is frozen in pure shock and fear -- eyes wide, mouth open -- the look of 'what the hell is that?!'. Soft flat overcast daylight, no sun, cool desaturated tones, not dark, tense, ominous. Face sharp and prominent, hyperrealistic, 8K.
